subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of the Book, sent down in truth from the Kingdom of the grace of your Lord, the Most High, the Most Great, whereby hearts are drawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الکتاب نزلت بالحق من جبروت فضل ربکم العلی العظیم و بها تنجذب افئده
subcodes.subjects: @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
